name_cn:

Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag
This brand-new Gucci Jackie small shoulder bag is crafted from top-quality leather, showcasing the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. Light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and a matching strap with red and green webbing add more styling possibilities to this orange patent leather Gucci Jackie small shoulder bag.
Model: 782849
Color: Orange Patent Leather
Size: 27.5x19x4cm
